title: Project Moon Origins
description: This mod adds Binah, an arbiter, and The Red Mist, a color fixer, from the serise Library Of Ruina to the origins mod. The characters are not owned by me, and are owned by Project Moon.
body: This mod adds Binah, an arbiter, and The Red Mist, a color fixer, from the serise Library Of Ruina to the origins mod. The characters are not owned by me, and are owned by Project Moon. The Mimicry model was also not made by me and was made by Lazaru on Planet Minecraft. This is still in early design and I am NOT good when it comes to graphics. Also this is like my first mod so half of it is really bad and poor code and the other half works when I tested it. If you have requets that you want me to change tell me and I will get to them... eventually. Enjoy!
